untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'Antipattern formations' and 'final failure tests' which are qualitative pattern recognition concepts not expressible with available quantitative indicators. Breakout confirmation thresholds, volume multipliers, and antipattern candle counts are specified as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders without concrete values. Chop tolerance indicator (measuring consolidation/choppiness) is not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated using breakout logic (close crossing pivot levels), volume confirmation (vol_ratio_20), trend strength (ADX > 25 for TRENDING regime), and exit on reversal (ATR-based stop approximated as 2% stop_loss_pct). Entry uses pivot-based support/resistance as proxy for resistance/support breakouts. This captures the spirit of trend transition trading but cannot precisely implement antipattern/failure-test logic without additional pattern recognition capability.
